name: Banana Nut Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift flour and mix with baking powder, baking soda, and salt.
2. Cream butter and add sugar gradually.
3. Beat in eggs one at a time thoroughly.
4. Add mashed bananas to the mixture and blend well.
5. Gradually stir in dry ingredients.
6. Mix in chopped nuts.
7. Pour batter into a greased loaf pan.
8. Bake for 45-60 minutes at 350°F.
9. Allow bread to cool in the pan for a few minutes before removing it.
